name.description: Display label for this connection, for example the Business Manager name

auth_type.description: oauth = Facebook Login long-lived user token (about 60 days). system_user = durable Business Manager system-user token.

token.description: Access token. Read server-side by functions; the UI only ever receives a masked tail.

token_expires_at.description: Expiry for oauth tokens. Null for system-user tokens, which do not expire.

connected_account_id.description: Meta user or system-user id from GET /me

connected_account_name.description: Meta user or system-user name from GET /me

business_id.description: Primary Business Manager id when known. Nullable.

business_name.description: Primary Business Manager name when known. Nullable.

status.description: Set to invalid on Graph auth errors, expired when token_expires_at has passed.

last_error.description: Last Graph API auth error message. Empty when healthy.

legacy_token_id.description: Id of the legacy IntegrationConfig token this connection was migrated from. Used for migration idempotency.
